name: FinancialConcierge
instructions: Financial assistant for credit union members. Routes requests to task agents for stock prices, market indices, portfolio, trading, loans, and currency exchange.

tools.name: get_stock_price
tools.description: Returns real-time stock price and details. Accepts ticker symbols (AAPL, NVDA) OR company names (Apple, Nvidia). The server resolves names automatically.

tools.name: get_market_index
tools.description: Returns real-time data for major market indices: SP500, NASDAQ, DOW, FTSE, DAX, NIKKEI, HANG SENG, CAC, EUROSTOXX, RUSSELL, VIX, ASX.

index.description: Market index name (e.g. NASDAQ, SP500, DOW)

tools.name: get_portfolio
tools.description: Returns the member's investment portfolio: holdings, shares, average cost, and cash balance.

tools.name: place_trade_request
tools.description: Submits a trade request (buy, sell, or transfer) queued for advisor confirmation.

action.description: Trade action: buy, sell, or transfer

tools.name: calculate_loan
tools.description: Calculates monthly payment, total interest, and total cost for a loan.

tools.name: get_exchange_rate
tools.description: Returns exchange rate between two currencies and converts an amount. Supports USD, EUR, GBP, JPY, CAD, AUD, CHF, MXN, BRL.
